markAsMT.description: Marks generated TM entries as machine translation by setting creationId to "MT!"

makeTM.description: Imports translated entries into a Pensieve TM, creating it if necessary

makeTMX.description: Creates a TMX document with all translated entries across all input documents

sendTMX.description: Sends the generated TMX document to the next step instead of the original input document

checkExistingTm.description: Skips entries that already have translations in an existing Pensieve TM

segment.description: Segments text units into sentences using SRX rules before translation
